cards.name: Builder
cards.primary_action: Place a building corresponding to your player type. Pay 1 Wood, 1 Ore, and 1 Coin. Buildings cannot be placed adjacent to Fog hexes and must be placed adjacent to an existing building you own or adjacent to an Infrastructure hex.

per_player_rules.industrialist: Build a Farm or Industrial Zone on a Sand or Field hex; must be adjacent to another Farm, Industrial Zone, or Infrastructure.
per_player_rules.hotelier: Build a Housing or Resort on a Sand or Field hex; must be adjacent to another Resort, Housing, or Infrastructure.
per_player_rules.bureaucrat: Build a Civic Office or Infrastructure on a Sand or Field hex; Infrastructure must be adjacent to a Village, Farm, Housing, Industrial Zone, Resort, or Civic Office.

cards.market_action: Instead of building, buy or sell up to 4 Wood or up to 4 Ore at the Resource Market.

cards.name: Elder
cards.primary_action: Take one of two actions: (1) Reveal a hidden settlement — convert any Fog hex into a Field, Mountain, Forest, or Sand hex and place a Village on that hex. The Village must be placed on a Fog hex. (2) Place a Reserve on a Sand, Field, Forest, or Mountain hex adjacent to a Village or Reserve. Cannot be placed adjacent to Fog. Costs 1 Coin plus 1 additional Coin per Reserve already placed.
cards.market_action: Instead of using either action above, buy or sell up to 4 Wood or up to 4 Ore at the Resource Market.

cards.name: Guide
cards.primary_action: Explore or Survey a hex on the map. Select any non-Fog hex as the target. Explore (target has at least one adjacent Fog hex): all adjacent Fog hexes are revealed and become Mountain, Forest, Field, Sand, or Water. Survey (target has no adjacent Fog hexes): the hex is fully surveyed, potentially revealing a hidden resource such as an archaeological site, ruins, natural wonder, gems, or fertile soil.
cards.market_action: Instead of exploring or surveying, recruit a Personnel card from the Talent track.

cards.name: Liaison
cards.primary_action: Take one of two actions: (1) Generate Resources (Procurement) — generate Votes, Coins, or Wood/Ore from your buildings based on adjacencies. Resources cannot be generated from hexes occupied by a Reserve. (2) Politics Market — buy 1 Event card from the Politics market by paying its Coin cost. The card is added to your Tableau and is available for use this turn.

cards.name: Charter
cards.effect: Place a building corresponding to your player type without paying building costs and ignoring the adjacency requirement. Chieftain: place a Village on any Fog, Field, Sand, Forest, or Mountain hex — unlike Elder, Charter allows Village placement on already-revealed hexes. Others: place your primary building (Resort, Industrial Zone, or Infrastructure) on any Field or Sand hex. Adjacent Fog hexes are revealed and become Mountain, Forest, Field, or Sand hexes.
